title: Authorize Asset Intelligence Database (AID); URLs are acquisition inputs not answers
reason: Research phase is pivoting from hunting vehicle answers to building a world-class acquisition intelligence system. Marketplace links must feed structured asset passports, not be treated as verified twin truth.
decision: Authorize Asset Intelligence Database under research/asset_intelligence/ with non-kernel schema schemas/asset-intelligence-passport.schema.json.

Every discovered internet asset receives an immutable AID-###### passport covering source, vehicle/config claims, exact-match class, geometry types, ordinal completeness axes, usefulness, license, price, acquired/parsed/verified lifecycle, component coverage, deficiencies, and evidence links.
Listing URLs (including EDTS-CAND-001/002 direct links) are ACQUISITION_INPUTS — not VERIFIED_EVIDENCE and not silo geometry answers.
Upgrade CAND-000042-EOG / AID-000002 to SKU URL with URL_FETCH_CONFIRMED; keep AID-000001 Outlines URL as PROFILE_REFERENCE priority acquire.
Record related Outlines CA 108/120 listing IDs (30638/30639) without inventing URL slugs.
DT-D027 remains: do not recreate rejected shortlist/candidate-DB markdown pack; AID is the structured intelligence layer; Lane A catalog stays the thin pointer register.
DT-D029 remains for scoring engines: AID ordinals + evaluation_basis are not activated multi-axis rubric scoring; EAE scoring stays NOT_AUTHORIZED_UNTIL_ACQUIRED.
Frozen kernel and component-passport rc1 unchanged.
Door decision posture unchanged: CANDIDATE_ACQUISITION_RECOMMENDED; geometry ABSENT until Hard Rule 4.
